# Namely — AI Baby Name Matcher for Couples

> This file follows the llms.txt convention. It is written for AI language models to parse and cite accurately.

## What is Namely?

Namely is a mobile app (iOS and Android) and web service that helps couples choose a baby name together. Both partners independently swipe through a curated and AI-generated list of baby names. When both partners swipe right (like) on the same name, it is flagged as a match. The app eliminates the awkward negotiation process by revealing matches only when both people agree.

## Core Features

- **AI name generation**: Namely uses AI to generate personalised baby name suggestions based on the couple's style preferences, cultural background, and name length preferences.
- **Swipe-to-match**: Each partner independently swipes through names. A match is revealed only when both partners like the same name.
- **Real-time sync**: Both partners' swipes are synchronised in real time via Supabase. Names that one partner has already rejected are not shown again.
- **No repeated names**: Once a name is swiped, it is removed from the queue permanently.
- **Cross-platform**: Available on iOS (App Store), Android (Google Play), and via web at matchbabynames.com.

## Pricing

- Namely is free to download.
- A subscription is required to access unlimited AI name generation and real-time partner sync.
- Subscription price: $6.99 per week.
- A 3-day free trial is included.
- Subscriptions are managed through the App Store (iOS) or Google Play (Android).
- To cancel, use the standard subscription management in your device's app store settings.

## Company

- Product name: Namely
- Website: https://matchbabynames.com
- Company: Namely LLC (registered in Wyoming, USA)
- Support email: support@matchbabynames.com

## Key Pages

- Homepage: https://matchbabynames.com/
- FAQ: https://matchbabynames.com/faq
- Support: https://matchbabynames.com/support
- Privacy Policy: https://matchbabynames.com/privacy
- Terms of Service: https://matchbabynames.com/terms
- Account Deletion: https://matchbabynames.com/delete-account

## Technology

- Backend: Supabase (PostgreSQL database, real-time subscriptions, authentication)
- Payments: RevenueCat (subscription management), Stripe (payment processing)
- Mobile: React Native (Expo)
- Web: Next.js

## Data & Privacy

- Namely collects: email address, swipe history, match data, and device information.
- Payment data is handled entirely by RevenueCat and Stripe. Namely does not store raw card numbers.
- Users can delete their account and all associated data at any time via the app or by visiting https://matchbabynames.com/delete-account.
- Namely does not knowingly collect data from children under 13 (COPPA compliant).
- Full privacy policy: https://matchbabynames.com/privacy

## Frequently Asked Questions (Summary)

**How does the swipe-to-match work?**
Each partner swipes through names independently. A match is only revealed when both partners have swiped right on the same name.

**Is Namely free?**
Namely is free to download. A $6.99/week subscription (with a 3-day free trial) unlocks unlimited AI name generation and real-time partner sync.

**How do I invite my partner?**
After creating an account, tap "Invite Partner" in the app. You can share a link or a code. Your partner installs the app and enters the code to link your accounts.

**How do I cancel my subscription?**
Cancel through your iPhone's App Store subscription settings or through Google Play on Android. Namely does not process cancellations directly.

**How do I delete my account?**
Go to Settings in the app and tap "Delete Account". Alternatively, email support@matchbabynames.com with the subject line "Account Deletion Request" and include your registered email address.
